# VanTripJapan

> Campervan rental and travel magazine based in Fukuoka, Japan. We help international travelers explore Kyushu by campervan with all-inclusive pricing starting from ¥16,500/day.

## About

VanTripJapan is a travel media and campervan rental service operated from Hakozaki, Fukuoka — just 10 minutes from Fukuoka Airport. We provide:

- Campervan rental with all-inclusive pricing (insurance, ETC card, camping gear, 24/7 support)
- Two vehicle options: Roof Tent Probox (¥16,500~/day) and Bed Bongo Brawny (¥22,000~/day)
- Travel guides and road trip itineraries for Kyushu, Japan
- Multilingual support in 100+ languages
- Content in English, French, German, and Traditional Chinese

## Target Audience

International travelers visiting Kyushu, Japan — especially from France, Germany, Australia, Taiwan, Israel, and other countries where van life and road trips are popular.

## Key Pages

- Homepage (Magazine): https://vantripjapan.jp/
- Campervan Rental: https://vantripjapan.jp/rent/
- Contact: https://vantripjapan.jp/contact/

- Japan Campervan vs Hotel — The Real Cost Comparison: https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/japan-campervan-vs-hotel-cost/
- Can Foreigners Drive in Japan? Complete License Guide: https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/can-foreigners-drive-in-japan/
- What to Pack for a Japan Campervan Trip: https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/japan-campervan-packing-list/
- What Is a Michi-no-Eki (Roadside Station): https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/what-is-a-michi-no-eki/
- How to Enjoy Japanese Hot Springs (Onsen): https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/how-to-enjoy-japanese-hot-springs/
- Japan Road Rules for Campervan: https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/japan-road-rules-for-campervan/

- Campground & Campervan Overnight Guide: https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/campground-and-campervan-guide/
- Japan Campervan FAQ: https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/japan-campervan-faq/
- Driving in Japan with a German License: https://vantripjapan.jp/posts/german-license-japan/

## Rental Details

- Location: Hakozaki, Higashi-ku, Fukuoka (10 min from Fukuoka Airport)
- Hours: 9:00–17:00 (flexible by arrangement)
- Pricing: All-inclusive from ¥16,500/day
- Includes: Insurance (CDW), ETC card, English navigation, camping gear, 24/7 roadside assistance, multilingual support
- Contact: WhatsApp or LINE
- License: International Driving Permit (IDP) for Geneva Convention countries; JAF translation for Taiwan, Germany, France, Switzerland, Belgium, etc.

## Optional

- Associated service: JDLTC (Japan Driver's License Translation Center) — assists with license translation and travel support services
